values.description: Where uvicorn is listening. WSL note: 127.0.0.1 in WSL is reachable from Windows Postman via the same host on recent WSL2 (mirrored networking). If not, run uvicorn with --host 0.0.0.0 and use http://<WSL-IP>:8000 — find the IP with `hostname -I` inside WSL.
Set this only if you set TCP_API_KEY in .env. Otherwise leave blank — the server ignores the header when no key is configured.
Auto-filled by the 'Create project' request's test script.
Auto-filled by 'Start analyze' and 'Start finalize'. Used by 'Poll job status'.
Cluster count picked after reviewing the k-selection plot. Updated when you submit labels.
Filename (e.g. crown_00123.tif) returned by the Clusters endpoint, used by 'Crown image (PNG)'.
